# LanguagesTutor

LanguagesTutor is an online language-learning platform offering structured courses in Pashto, Arabic, Urdu, and English. The platform provides live online classes for kids, adults, ladies, professionals, Quran learners, and global students.

## Main Pages

- Homepage: https://www.languagestutor.org
- About LanguagesTutor: https://www.languagestutor.org/about
- Courses: https://www.languagestutor.org/courses
- Blog: https://www.languagestutor.org/blog
- Testimonials: https://www.languagestutor.org/testimonials
- Books: https://www.languagestutor.org/books
- Contact: https://www.languagestutor.org/contact

## Arabic Version

- Arabic Homepage: https://www.languagestutor.org/ar
- Arabic Courses: https://www.languagestutor.org/ar/courses
- Arabic Blog: https://www.languagestutor.org/ar/blog
- Arabic Contact: https://www.languagestutor.org/ar/contact

## Pashto Courses

- Pashto Beginner Course: https://www.languagestutor.org/courses/pashto-beginner-course
- Advanced Pashto Course: https://www.languagestutor.org/courses/advanced-pashto-course
- Professional Pashto Course: https://www.languagestutor.org/courses/professional-pashto-course
- Pashto Dialects Course: https://www.languagestutor.org/courses/pashto-dialects-course
- Customized Pashto Course: https://www.languagestutor.org/courses/customized-pashto-course
- Complete Pashto Mastery Program: https://www.languagestutor.org/courses/pashto-mastery-program

## Instructor

Mohsin Ali is the founder and lead instructor of LanguagesTutor. He teaches Pashto, Arabic, Urdu, English, Quran reading, Tajweed, Gulf Arabic, Pashto grammar, Pashto conversation, and professional language courses.

## Contact

For course enrollment, consultation, or learning support, visit:
https://www.languagestutor.org/contact
